photon_budget.mode_bridge: N_mode = chi_mode*Nret; high-NS maps are target-channel topology, not predicted pipeline occupancy

exact_qfi.scope: low-photon finite-Fock diagnostic with idler phase-noise stress test

G_eff: retained only as optimistic candidate envelope, not exact non-Gaussian QFI
macro_uncertainty_appendix: removed/downgraded from manuscript; no single-seed toy curve is used for claims
